recipes.title: Glowing Green Smoothie
recipes.short_description: A hormone-balancing smoothie rich in fiber and antioxidants.
recipes.description: A nutrient-dense smoothie designed to support skin health and hormonal balance using fresh greens and healthy fats.
recipes.steps: Add all ingredients to blender|Blend until smooth|Serve chilled

recipes.title: Berry Power Oatmeal
recipes.short_description: Hearty oats topped with fresh berries and nuts.
recipes.description: Slow-release carbohydrates from oats combined with antioxidant-rich berries for a perfect morning energy boost.
recipes.steps: Boil water and add oats|Simmer for 5-10 minutes|Top with berries, nuts and honey

recipes.title: Quinoa Summer Salad
recipes.short_description: Fresh and light quinoa salad with Mediterranean veggies.
recipes.description: A protein-packed salad featuring fluffy quinoa, crunchy cucumbers, and a zesty lemon dressing.
recipes.steps: Cook quinoa according to package|Chop vegetables and mix with cooled quinoa|Add dressing and feta
